3155170.name: One with the Unicycleverse
3155170.description:
A precision platformer where you maneuver your unicycle though dozens of levels and side modes. 

Will you become one with the Unicycleverse?

Simple controls

The game features very simple controls that are hard to master:

Lean left, lean right and jump, very simple.

But these controls allow you to do many things in different contexts. On the ground; alternate leaning left and right to peddle; allowing to move. In the air; lean left or right to flip left or right, paired with a jump; this effectively doubles your jump height! You can also wall jump!
